prose:
**Nitrobenzene Fukui reactivity** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals), in PySCF via chemkit’s DFT engine; gas phase; charge 0; multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz` (no optimization). Partial charges by Mulliken (PySCF). SCF converged cleanly; no warnings reported. The most electrophilic atom is C₄ (f⁺ = 0.4964178) and the most nucleophilic atom is C₅ (f⁻ = 0.1072882).

Command:
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout none --out nitrobenzene_fukui_dft_standard.json`

Output JSON: `nitrobenzene_fukui_dft_standard.json`
Plot PNG: `nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity_plot.png`
Live log: `fukui_<timestamp>.out` (streaming during the run, in the cwd).
